svg.title: Rentar fuel catalyst molecular conditioning
svg.desc: Fuel enters the Rentar fuel catalyst as clustered, clumped molecules on the left, passes through the in-line catalyst, and exits on the right as dispersed, evenly separated molecules that produce a finer atomized spray at the injector.
svg.text: fuel catalyst · molecular conditioning for finer atomization
Passive, in-line device · conditions fuel at the molecular level to improve atomization and combustion · no moving parts
